hero: CONTENT: A wide banner-style conceptual diagram for an article titled 'How Ray turns one function call into cross-machine collaboration'. On the LEFT, a single small purple rounded box labeled "@ray.remote def A()" (a single-machine function). A big bold black arrow points RIGHT, fanning out into a cluster: three dashed-teal rounded "Node" containers, each holding a small purple "Worker" and a small teal "Object Store", with thin black arrows flowing between them. Above the arrow a short dark-red caption: "one decorator, and it runs across the whole cluster". Keep it clean and horizontal, lots of whitespace, banner aspect ratio (wide).
